nasb.text: They have gone deep in depravity As in the days of Gibeah; He will remember their iniquity, He will punish their sins.

esv.text: They have deeply corrupted themselves as in the days of Gibeah: he will remember their iniquity; he will punish their sins.

cnv.text: 以法蓮深深敗壞， 如同在基比亞的日子一般。 　神必記得他們的罪孽， 懲罰他們的罪惡。

ccb.text: 你们败坏至极， 恰如从前在基比亚的日子。 耶和华必记住你们的罪恶， 追讨你们的罪债。
